rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Diantz Alternate Data Stream Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Diantz Alternate Data Stream Execution
id: 6b369ced-4b1d-48f1-b427-fdc0de0790bd
status: test
description: Compress target file into a cab file stored in the Alternate Data Stream
  (ADS) of the target file.
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Diantz/
author: frack113
date: 2021-11-26
modified: 2022-12-31
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1564.004
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - diantz.exe
    - .cab
    CommandLine|re: :[^\\]
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Very Possible
level: medium
